nodes.title: The PM Group Helps IHOP Spread the Love on National Pancake Day!
Agency Rallies Behind AHA’s Go Red for Women Movement
National Pancake Day Facts You’ll Flip Over!

pageContext.content:
IHOP’s approach to Veteran’s Day 2017 is simple. Taste good and do good.
 
Valerie Lopez, spokesperson for the San Antonio IHOP franchise, will appear on KABB’s Daytime at Nine and WOAI’s San Antonio Living to share how IHOP is honoring Veterans during November.
 
This year, IHOP is stepping up their game to expand recognition for the heroes and champions of our community. On Friday, November 10th from 7AM-7PM, all active duty and retired military personnel can enjoy a FREE stack of Red, White, and Blue pancakes! This delicious offer consists of 3 of IHOP’s famous buttermilk pancakes, with patriotic toppings of glazed strawberries, blueberry compote and whipped topping.
 
As sweet as this event is, IHOP isn’t stopping there. During the entire month of November, IHOP will also be raising money to support the Children of Fallen Patriots Foundation. Children of Fallen Patriots is dedicated to serving and supporting families of service members who have died in the line of duty serving in any branch of the armed forces. Children of Fallen Patriots Foundation raises funds to ensure that every single child of a fallen patriot has the opportunity to go to college and create a better life for themselves.
 
So during November, IHOP will donate $1 to the foundation for every Red, White, and Blue Breakfast Combo purchased. IHOP guests can enjoy a great patriotic breakfast and help make the future bright for children who have lost a parent. There’s nothing sweeter than that!
 
About The PM Group: The PM Group was founded in 1988. Over the past 30 years, the agency has continued to grow and is currently listed as San Antonio’s Largest Advertising Agency by the San Antonio Business Journal. The PM Group’s client roster spans numerous industries including automotive, CPG, entertainment and sports marketing, legal, business services, non-profit, real estate and fitness. In addition, the agency hosts an annual Charity Gala every February that to date has raised over $2.5 million for local San Antonio area non-profit organizations in the last 15 years! It is our way of giving back to the community that we so humbly serve.
